title: BOLD & DIVINE Handcrafted Cardinal Bird Keepsake Urns | Small | Mini Urn Set of 4 | For Human Ashes With Premium Box & Funnel
features: ✦✦ PROUDLY SHARE YOUR LOVED ONES REMAINS WITH FAMILY USING THESE PREMIUM QUALITY SHARING KEEPSAKE URNS - Our Heavenly Peace lovely mini keepsake urns have been made with care and love to be shared amongst family and friends. In these very tough times you can take ease knowing these beautiful solid Aluminum urns will be perfect and will stand the test of time. Every time you look at these you can be proud in the decision you have made.

✦✦ BEAUTIFUL HIGH QUALITY URNS MADE TO STAND THE TEST OF TIME - These mini Aluminum keepsake urns are 2.75 inches tall. They are solid, durable and feel substantial. These are small keepsakes, fit in the palm of your hand and only hold a small amount of remains.

✦✦ THIS DURABLE AND HIGH QUALITY URN IS MADE TO LAST THE TEST OF TIME - These Urns are made from the highest quality of material with superior craftsmanship and strict quality control. It is very solid, durable and was built to last to make sure that your loved ones are given with utmost respect.

✦✦ INCLUDES LOVELY PROTECTIVE CASE AND 4 VELVET POUCHES - This beautiful and comforting case is perfect for carrying, storing and safegaurding all 4 urns until you are ready to pass them out to their final owner.

✦✦ THESE URNS WILL LEAVE YOU COMPLETELY SATISFIED OR FULL REFUND - Bold & Divine is a company who cares for you, your family, and your late loved one. If for any reason you are not completely satisfied, just return them for a full refund.
description: From the manufacturer Bold & Design is a Well Reputed Company established in 2008. We proudly design, manufacture and distribute a line of high-quality memorial products Cardinal Bird Small Keepsake Urns for Human Ashes - Set of 4 Our keepsake urns are handcrafted and hand painted by skilled artisans ensuring our products are wonderfully detailed with an impressive eye for detail. Our products are all handmade from the most durable materials, ensuring exceptional build and finish quality. We do not use or support any mass production techniques and use time honored traditional manufacturing techniques to honor your loved one. These small keepsake urns are made of Aluminum, it looks beautiful and has a heavy substantial feel Each keepsake urn has a threaded top ensuring the remains of your loved one are kept secure. Felt bottom to protect against scratches on any surface. Each set comes in a premium black gift box with 4 velvet pouches. Our keepsake urns are specially coated with a Glossy Enamel to protect the color and urns surface.
